name: Turkey Divan
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter and gradually stir in flour to make a smooth paste.
2. Slowly add cream and whisk until smooth.
3. Place turkey in a baking dish, alternating with layers of broccoli spears.
4. Pour sauce over all and sprinkle with vegetable seasoning.
5. Top with Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-30 minutes; cheese will be bubbling and slightly browned.
